Session 1 	Session 2
In this training video Dean is going to help you extract exactly what to teach after your story in the “Story ‐ Teach ‐ Tool” dance. By answering a few
simple questions you will have a framework for what you can teach at any half day, full day or two day event, workshop or mastermind. These questions
will help you break down your expertise, learning woes and your victories to easy to share lessons.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
If you look back on the last 12 months in your business, what were the biggest needle movers? What made the biggest impact on your
business, finances and life?
What are the biggest mistakes you’ve made in the last 12 months that you could warn others NOT to do so they can avoid your mistakes?
What small daily or weekly habits do you do that help add to your business, personal and financial success?
If you could run into your teenage self what is one thing you would teach them that could exponentially change their life forever?
What is one thing that you are doing in your business that makes you successful that your competition and other people aren’t doing and
may not even know exist?

Session
Pick 5 ‐7 riffs topics you could talk about for 10, 15, 30 minutes passionately with no notes at all. These are your favorite things in the
world to teach or share.
